description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that creates a release zip file on demand. The workflow should have four jobs: build-linux, build-windows, build-darwin, and make-release. The first three jobs should build the project on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest respectively, and upload the build artifacts. The make-release job should wait for the previous jobs to complete, download the build artifacts, and create a release zip file containing the binaries.
